calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-19-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-10-2011 Continued To Jul-19-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for Petitioner.

Mr. Ferdon presented oral argument to support his position with regard to the issue of notice to the Franchise Tax Board. The accounting petition was continued to July 19, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for notice pursuant to Code Section 9202 or for Counsel to obtain a "no tax due" letter from the Franchise Tax Board.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
